Package jsim.api

Class BodyTracker

java.lang.Object
jsim.api.BodyTracker
public final class BodyTracker extends Object
Lightweight utility for querying and optionally recording the history of a SimBody's pose and velocity over time.

Call update() each tick (after world.step()) to record the current sample. History depth is bounded by maxHistory to avoid unbounded memory use during long simulations.

Typical usage — follow a game piece: 


 BodyTracker ballTracker = new BodyTracker(ball, 100);

 // In simulationPeriodic():
 world.step();
 ballTracker.update();
 Pose3d current = ballTracker.getPose();

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BodyTracker(SimBody target)
    Create a tracker with no history retention.
    BodyTracker(SimBody target, int maxHistory)
    Create a tracker with bounded history.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d
    getPose()
    Latest recorded pose (updated by update()).
    edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d[]
    getPoseHistory()
    Ordered list of past poses, oldest first (empty if maxHistory == 0).

    getSpeed()
    Latest recorded speed.
    SimBody

    The body being tracked.

    Ordered list of past linear velocities, oldest first.

    Reset accumulated distance and clear history.

  • Constructor Details

    • BodyTracker

      public BodyTracker(SimBody target)
      Create a tracker with no history retention.
      Parameters:
      target - the body to track

    • BodyTracker

      public BodyTracker(SimBody target, int maxHistory)
      Create a tracker with bounded history.
      Parameters:
      target - the body to track
      maxHistory - maximum number of past samples to retain (0 = no history)

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update()
      Record the body's current state. Call once per tick after the physics step.

    • getTarget

      public SimBody getTarget()
      The body being tracked.
      Returns:
      the tracked SimBody

    • getPose

      public edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d getPose()
      Latest recorded pose (updated by update()).
      Returns:
      latest pose

    • getVelocity

      public edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation3d getVelocity()
      Latest recorded linear velocity.
      Returns:
      latest linear velocity

    • getSpeed

      public edu.wpi.first.units.measure.LinearVelocity getSpeed()
      Latest recorded speed.
      Returns:
      latest speed

    • getTotalDistance

      public edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Distance getTotalDistance()
      Total distance travelled since construction.
      Returns:
      total distance travelled

    • getPoseHistory

      public edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d[] getPoseHistory()
      Ordered list of past poses, oldest first (empty if maxHistory == 0). Returns a snapshot — modifying the returned array does not affect history.
      Returns:
      snapshot of past poses

    • getVelocityHistory

      public edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation3d[] getVelocityHistory()
      Ordered list of past linear velocities, oldest first.
      Returns:
      snapshot of past velocities

    • isAtRest

      public boolean isAtRest(edu.wpi.first.units.measure.LinearVelocity threshold)
      Whether the body is nearly stationary (speed below threshold).
      Parameters:
      threshold - maximum speed to be considered at rest
      Returns:
      true if current speed is below threshold

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Reset accumulated distance and clear history.
